basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Customer Service Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nabs India Finance (NABFINS) Customer Service Executive (CSE) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NABFINS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NABFINS Customer Service Executive (CSE) Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Customer Service Executive (CSE) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS CSE recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Customer Service Executive (CSE) post is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the CSE post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed their graduation or possess an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Customer Service Executive (CSE) position at NABFINS.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the NABFINS CSE job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all necessary documents to the designated email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies for the CSE post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Customer Service Executive (CSE) position in this recruitment drive by Nabs India Finance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the CSE position?
faq.answer: The Customer Service Executive (CSE) position is a full-time job opportunity at Nabs India Finance.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can download it from there.

faq.question: Q8. Does NABFINS provide salary details in the notification?
faq.answer: Salary details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. It is recommended to check the official notification for specific salary information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for the CSE post?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not specified in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for information on age criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.
